title: MikroTik S53UG+5HaxD2HaxD-TC&R11e-LTE7, Chateau LTE7 ax
description: The MikroTik Chateau LTE7 ax is an elegant dual-band Wi-Fi 6 routerboard operating simultaneously in the 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands, delivering a maximum total throughput of up to 1.77Gbps (2.4GHz 2x2 - 574Mbps, 5GHz 2x2 - 1200Mbps) and is equipped with (1) 2.5G port , (4) 1Gbit ports and (2) external Wi-Fi antennas The router is supplied together with the R11e-LTE7 modem . The modem supports 4G LTE (Cat. 7) and 3G networks, with speeds of up to 300Mbps downlink and 100Mbps uplink . It utilizes 2x2 MIMO on the downlink and carrier aggregation , which allows the simultaneous use of multiple LTE bands . This feature improves response times and connection stability in high-traffic areas and can enhance transmission efficiency in locations with weaker signal conditions Device Power adapter 24V/1.2A UTP patch cable 1.5m
